scripts.get-host: ip="http://$(ipconfig getifaddr en0):3000" && printf $ip | pbcopy && echo $ip
scripts.lint:all: yarn lint:format && yarn lint:js && yarn workspaces foreach -A --include "./packages/*" -p run lint:tsc
scripts.lint:precheck: cd $INIT_CWD && yarn lint:tsc && yarn lint:js && yarn lint:format --write
scripts.upgrade:yarn: yarn set version stable && yarn install
